user.title: Set up Grocery List Workflow
user.description: Enter the source and target Home Assistant to-do entity IDs.

error.same_entity: Source and target must be different entities.
error.entity_not_found: Both entries must be currently available to-do entities.

abort.already_configured: This source and target pair is already configured.

init.title: Private grocery route
init.description: This JSON is stored in your Home Assistant config entry and is not part of the public integration repository. AI classification is optional: it asks the selected Home Assistant AI task only about new unmapped items, then privately caches confident answers.

data.ai_classification_enabled: Use AI for new unmapped items

error.invalid_route_profile: The route profile JSON is invalid or references an unknown stop.
